title: thouinia tomentosa var. tomentosa
intro: Thouinia tomentosa var. tomentosa is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to the Caribbean and Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in compounds like limonene, beta-pinene, and geraniol, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, providing benefits such as relieving respiratory problems, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Thouinia tomentosa var. tomentosa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
